title: funcy's Netherite Horse Armor
description: A fabric mod that adds netherite horse armor to minecraft!
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/vOjckTo.png)


Elevate your Minecraft adventure with Funcy's Netherite Horse Armor mod! This exciting addition grants your trusty steed the ultimate protection, equivalent to full Netherite armor, making your mount as formidable as you are. Whether you're embarking on perilous quests or exploring treacherous terrains, your horse will now have unparalleled durability and defense. Equip your equine companion with the best, and ride into the fray with confidence and style!

You can get the horse armor in piglin's bastions with a 35% of spawning

# Showcase video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6mVNurHS0sk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


# Modpack 

Yes, you can add this mod to your modpack without my permission, however **you may not** claim this mod as "yours" or modify the mod for your own needs. Feel free to message me on [discord](https://discord.gg/CQ9BfSKjy8) and I might make it as a feature that everybody would love! 

I would appreciate it if you credited me in your modpack or [donated](https://paypal.me/funcybeardev) me!
